technicalSEO.title: Custom Bumper Magnets | Removable Magnets | Banners.com
technicalSEO.metaDescription: Custom bumper magnets make it easy to promote on the go! Bumper magnets are durable, weatherproof, and adjustable, making them ideal for most vehicles.

Custom Bumper Magnets for Vehicle Advertising & Promotion

Durable Magnetic Material for Vehicle Body Mounting & Outdoor Use

PASTE INTO: Product Title / Subtitle Section -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CONFIGURATOR LABELS ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW Choose your bumper magnet size and customization options below. Upload your artwork or let our design team create professional vehicle advertising graphics for your magnetic signs. PASTE INTO: Configurator Labels -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Weatherproof Bumper Magnets for Mobile Business Advertising

Transform your vehicle into mobile advertising with custom bumper magnets designed for automotive use. Our weatherproof magnetic signs provide removable vehicle advertising that's perfect for business promotion, political campaigns, and promotional messaging on cars, trucks, and fleet vehicles.

Each bumper magnet features durable 30 mil magnetic material with lamination protection for long-lasting outdoor performance. The magnetic backing adheres securely to steel vehicle surfaces while remaining easily removable without damage to paint or finish.

Before purchasing magnets, verify your vehicle has magnetic-receptive surfaces. Magnets won't stick to aluminum or plastic vehicle body panels common on newer vehicles.

Key Features for Vehicle Installation:

  • 30 mil magnetic material for secure vehicle mounting
  • Lamination included for weather protection
  • Maximum print size: 24" x 24"
  • Full-color printing for vibrant vehicle graphics
  • Removable adhesion without paint damage
PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Magnetic Material for Automotive Vehicle Installation

Our bumper magnets use premium 30 mil magnetic material specifically designed for automotive vehicle mounting and outdoor exposure. This heavyweight magnetic stock provides strong adhesion to steel vehicle surfaces while maintaining flexibility for curved bumper installation.

Material Specifications:

  • Thickness: 30 mil magnetic material for secure vehicle hold
  • Lamination: Protective coating included for UV and weather resistance
  • Magnetic Strength: High-strength magnet designed for highway speeds
  • Flexibility: Conforms to curved vehicle surfaces
  • Surface Compatibility: Adheres to steel vehicle panels only

Important Compatibility Note: Before purchasing, test your vehicle's surface with a small magnet. Many modern vehicles use aluminum or plastic body panels where magnets will not stick. Magnetic signs work best on steel surfaces found on older vehicles and commercial trucks.

The laminated surface protects your printed graphics from fading, scratching, and weather damage during vehicle use. This durable construction ensures your bumper magnet maintains professional appearance through extended outdoor exposure.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Bumper Magnet Finishing Options for Secure Vehicle Mounting

Choose the optimal finishing option for your vehicle installation needs. Each cut style affects both appearance and performance when mounted on your vehicle's surface.

Rounded Corners (Recommended):

  • Improved airflow over magnet surface during driving
  • Reduces wind lift and chance of detachment
  • Professional appearance on vehicle mounting
  • Best option for highway driving conditions

Square Cut:

  • Sharp, clean edges for modern vehicle aesthetics
  • Maximum print area utilization
  • Professional business appearance
  • Suitable for lower-speed vehicle use

Contour Cut:

  • Custom shape following your design outline
  • Unique vehicle graphics presentation
  • Eliminates excess magnetic material
  • Perfect for logo-shaped vehicle magnets

For vehicles driven at highway speeds, rounded corners provide the best aerodynamic performance and secure mounting. The rounded edge design allows air to flow smoothly over the magnet surface, preventing wind from lifting corners during high-speed driving.

PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Bumper Magnet Production & Rush Order Times

Choose flexible production timelines ranging from 1 to 5 business days to meet your vehicle advertising deadlines. All production times start after artwork approval and file upload completion.

1 Business Day Priority:

  • Fastest turnaround for urgent vehicle advertising needs
  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST process next business day
  • Emergency same-day rushes available in select cases
  • Contact customer service for same-day availability

2 Business Days Express:

  • Quick production for time-sensitive vehicle campaigns
  • Ideal balance of speed and cost efficiency
  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST process next business day

3 Business Days Standard:

  • Most popular production option
  • Free standard turnaround time
  • Perfect for most vehicle advertising projects

5 Business Days Saver:

  • Budget-friendly option for advance vehicle advertising planning
  • Cost savings for non-urgent magnetic sign orders
  • Best value for bulk vehicle magnet orders

Production Notes: Total delivery time includes both production and shipping time. If your order requires prepress review or proof approval, production time begins after final approval is received.

PASTE INTO: Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Bumper Magnet Payment & Ordering Options

All custom bumper magnets require payment before production begins to ensure your vehicle advertising project starts immediately upon approval.

Accepted Payment Methods:

  • Credit Cards: Visa, MasterCard, American Express, Discover
  • Company Checks: Must be received before production begins
  • Business Accounts: Contact customer service for account setup

Payment Processing:

  • Credit cards charged only after order approval
  • No charges during design or proof review stages
  • Secure payment processing for business transactions
  • Order confirmation sent upon payment completion

Check Payment Guidelines:

For check payments, orders enter production after check receipt and processing. This may add 3-5 business days to your total delivery time. For faster processing of vehicle advertising orders, credit card payment is recommended.

Business accounts with established credit terms are available for frequent vehicle advertising customers. Contact our customer service team at (320) 391-5300 for account application and approval information.

PASTE INTO: Payment Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shipping Options for Custom Bumper Magnet Delivery

Your custom bumper magnets ship via UPS Ground unless alternate shipping is specified. We provide 1-3 day ground delivery to 90% of the United States for fast vehicle advertising deployment.

Standard Shipping Information:

  • Default Method: UPS Ground shipping
  • Coverage: 1-3 day delivery to most US locations
  • Tracking: Tracking number provided when shipped
  • Pricing: Based on package weight and destination

Shipping Guidelines:

  • Large magnet orders may incur additional shipping charges
  • Expedited shipping options available for urgent vehicle advertising
  • Contact customer service at (320) 391-5300 for shipping questions
  • International shipping available upon request

Package Protection:

Damaged goods during shipping require return of damaged items before replacement shipment. Lost packages are replaced following shipping carrier claim resolution. Weather delays or natural disasters affecting shipping carriers are not covered by shipping refunds.

For critical vehicle advertising deadlines, consider expedited shipping options to ensure on-time delivery for your promotional campaign or business launch.

PASTE INTO: Shipping Guidelines Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== COMMON USES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Vehicle Advertising & Promotional Uses for Bumper Magnets

Custom bumper magnets provide versatile, removable vehicle advertising for businesses, organizations, and promotional campaigns. Transform any magnetic-compatible vehicle into mobile advertising space.

Business Vehicle Advertising:

  • Company logo and contact information display
  • Service vehicle identification for contractors
  • Delivery vehicle branding for restaurants and retail
  • Real estate agent vehicle advertising
  • Fleet vehicle identification and branding

Political & Campaign Use:

  • Candidate name and campaign messaging
  • Election promotion for local and state campaigns
  • Issue advocacy and awareness campaigns
  • Voter registration and election reminders

Event & Promotional Marketing:

  • Special event promotion and advertising
  • Sale announcements for retail businesses
  • Grand opening and new location announcements
  • Seasonal business promotion
  • Fundraising campaign vehicle advertising

Personal & Organization Use:

  • Sports team support and school spirit
  • Club and organization membership display
  • Cause awareness and advocacy messaging
  • Family business and hobby promotion

The removable nature of magnetic vehicle advertising allows for easy updating of promotional messages, seasonal campaigns, or temporary business promotion without permanent vehicle modification.

PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Bumper Magnet Artwork Requirements for Full-Color Printing

Upload professional artwork files or work with our design team to create effective vehicle advertising graphics for your custom bumper magnets.

Recommended File Formats:

  • Vector Files (.eps): Best quality for vehicle graphics printing
  • PDF Files: High-resolution PDFs with embedded fonts
  • JPEG Files: High-resolution images (300 DPI minimum)
  • Font Requirements: Convert fonts to outlines in vector files

Design Guidelines for Vehicle Use:

  • Use bold, high-contrast colors for vehicle visibility
  • Ensure text is readable from driving distances
  • Include essential contact information prominently
  • Consider vehicle mounting location in design layout
  • Account for rounded corners in design composition

Professional Design Services:

Our graphic design team creates professional vehicle advertising layouts when you don't have print-ready artwork. Upload your logo, photos, and text content, then provide design instructions for custom bumper magnet creation.

Color Matching Services:

For color-critical vehicle branding projects, our Color Match Proof System ensures accurate color reproduction. Contact customer service for color matching information and pricing.

Artwork Review Process:

Request order proofs to review your vehicle advertising design before production. Proofs include low-resolution artwork preview, order summary with pricing, and billing information for approval before printing begins.

PASTE INTO: Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Order Custom Bumper Magnets for Vehicle Advertising Today

Transform your vehicle into powerful mobile advertising with custom bumper magnets designed for automotive use. Our weatherproof magnetic signs provide professional vehicle branding that's removable, reusable, and built for highway driving conditions.

Start your vehicle advertising campaign with durable 30 mil magnetic material, full-color printing, and protective lamination. Choose from flexible production times ranging from 1-5 business days to meet your promotional deadlines.

Ready to Get Started?

Upload your artwork using our online design tool, or work with our professional design team to create compelling vehicle graphics. Configure your bumper magnet size, select finishing options, and choose your production timeline above.

Questions about vehicle compatibility, artwork requirements, or bulk pricing? Contact our customer service team at (320) 391-5300 or toll-free at 866.419.7446. We're here to help you create effective vehicle advertising that drives results for your business or campaign.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Frequently Asked Questions

Will a bumper magnet stick to my vehicle?

Bumper magnets stick only to steel vehicle surfaces. Many modern vehicles use aluminum or plastic body panels where magnets won't adhere. Test your vehicle's surface with a small magnet before ordering. Magnetic signs work best on older vehicles and commercial trucks with steel body panels.

What material are your bumper magnets made from?

Our bumper magnets use 30 mil magnetic material with protective lamination. This heavyweight magnetic stock provides strong adhesion to steel vehicle surfaces while maintaining flexibility for curved bumper installation. The laminated surface protects against UV damage, weather, and scratching during vehicle use.

Can I upload my own artwork for a bumper magnet?

Yes, you can upload vector files (.eps), high-resolution PDFs, or JPEG images for custom printing. Vector files with fonts converted to outlines produce the best results. If you need design assistance, our professional graphic design team can create vehicle advertising layouts using your logo and content.

Can I choose different cut shapes for my bumper magnets?

We offer three finishing options: rounded corners (recommended for highway driving), square cut for clean edges, and contour cut following your design shape. Rounded corners provide better aerodynamics and secure mounting for vehicles driven at highway speeds.

Is there a minimum order quantity for bumper magnets?

No minimum order quantity required. You can order single bumper magnets for personal use or large quantities for business fleet vehicles and promotional campaigns. Bulk pricing is available for larger vehicle advertising orders.

Do you offer bulk pricing?

Yes, bulk pricing is available for large quantity orders. Contact our customer service team at (320) 391-5300 for volume pricing on fleet vehicle magnets, political campaign orders, or business promotional quantities.

How long do bumper magnets last?

With proper care and installation on compatible vehicle surfaces, bumper magnets can last several years. The laminated material protects against UV fading and weather damage. Longevity depends on driving conditions, vehicle maintenance, and proper installation on steel surfaces.

Are bumper magnets safe for painted surfaces?

Yes, magnetic vehicle signs are safe for painted steel surfaces when properly maintained. Remove magnets periodically for cleaning to prevent dirt buildup that could cause scratching. Clean both the magnet and vehicle surface before reapplication to maintain paint protection.

Are bumper magnets okay to go through a car wash?

Remove bumper magnets before automatic car washes to prevent damage or loss. High-pressure water and brushes can dislodge magnetic signs. Hand washing around magnetic signs is acceptable, but removal during car wash visits protects both the magnet and your vehicle's finish.

PASTE INTO: FAQ Tab --------------------------------------------------
